params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Nest (living area). Focus tightly on: sofa, coffee table, area rug, low linen sofa, sculptural oak coffee table, standing_desk and chair, open bookshelf, front exterior windows and glass opening to Relax, low linen sofa on wooden base, standing_desk (compact) and chair, open bookshelf with curated books and a few ceramics, large potted plant near the window, visible front exterior windows and glass opening toward Relax, bookshelf. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A warm, calm Japandi interior that balances minimal Scandinavian restraint with tactile Japanese materiality. Emphasize light woods, soft neutrals, and purposeful negative space. Scenes should feel lived-in yet curated for a young family: a cozy work corner, durable natural textiles, and pockets for quiet family rituals (tea nook, low seating). Maintain uncluttered composition, tactile depth, and visible, believable light sources. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
